summary: Small repository-layout housekeeping PR that moved the placeholder file from `orig/GALE01/.gitkeep` into `orig/GALE01/sys/.gitkeep` and adjusted `.gitignore` so the `orig/*/sys` directory and its `.gitkeep` remain tracked while generated or extracted contents under `orig/*/sys/*` stay ignored.
what_changed: Updated `.gitignore` from allowing `!orig/*/.gitkeep` to allowing `!orig/*/sys`, ignoring `orig/*/sys/*`, and re-allowing `!orig/*/sys/.gitkeep`.
Renamed the empty tracked placeholder from `orig/GALE01/.gitkeep` to `orig/GALE01/sys/.gitkeep` with 100% similarity.
Preserved the broader ignore rule `orig/*/*` while carving out only the `sys` directory placeholder path for tracking.
smart_moves: Used a narrow negative-ignore sequence so Git can track the `sys` directory itself and its `.gitkeep` without accidentally tracking files generated or placed inside `orig/*/sys`.
Kept the repository placeholder pattern explicit instead of weakening the existing `orig/*/*` ignore coverage.
Moved the placeholder to match the desired directory structure rather than adding unrelated files or changing extraction outputs.
decomp_lessons: When adding tracked placeholders below ignored asset or original-disc directories, `.gitignore` must unignore each parent directory before unignoring the placeholder file.
For ignored original-data trees, prefer tracking only `.gitkeep` or equivalent scaffolding files and keep extracted binary/original contents ignored.
Repository-layout changes can matter for reproducible setup: keeping expected directory skeletons checked in reduces manual directory creation without committing proprietary or generated data.
naming_conventions: Uses `orig/<version>/sys/.gitkeep` for the tracked placeholder path, shown specifically as `orig/GALE01/sys/.gitkeep`.
Maintains the existing uppercase game/version directory name `GALE01`.
Uses `.gitkeep` as the convention for retaining otherwise-empty directories in Git.
follow_up_queries: Find later PRs that modify `orig/*/sys` ignore behavior or add additional version directories under `orig`.
Check whether setup or extraction scripts assume `orig/<version>/sys` exists after this change.
Look for related repository hygiene PRs around `.gitignore`, generated assets, and original-disc directory scaffolding.
